summary: Plan-mode live PR inventory classification. The shard has no shared canonical and merge/fix/raise_pr actions are blocked. Four open non-security PRs are kept out of automated closeout and routed to maintainer review for the specific product or technical decision shown per item. #89028 is routed as an exact security-sensitive PR ref after deterministic validation required route_security for that target.

actions.reason: Maintainer judgment is required on the product/compatibility value of changing command ordering and on the failed Real behavior proof; there is no safe duplicate, superseded, low-signal, merge, or fix action in this plan-mode shard.
Maintainer technical judgment is required for the large test-coverage diff and linked test-gap scope; automation should not close or merge it in this inventory shard.

This is a focused bug fix with passing checks, but accepting the Codex hook-history behavior requires maintainer technical correctness judgment; merge/fix actions are blocked and no closeout classification is supported.
Maintainer judgment is required because the fix spans session-state behavior and an additive public protocol contract; it is not a duplicate, superseded, low-signal, or mergeable-by-worker item.

The deterministic validator classified this exact PR target as security-sensitive, so ProjectClownfish must route #89028 to central security handling instead of leaving it as needs_human or planning any close, merge, or fix action.

needs_human: #85034: decide whether to keep pursuing the /new command ordering change despite the failed Real behavior proof and compatibility-risk label.
#86450: review the large test-only CLI daemon coverage diff for technical correctness and desired scope.
#89004: review the focused Codex before_prompt_build hook-history fix for compatibility and correctness.
#89017: decide whether to accept the session resume behavior and additive public protocol contract for Control UI reconnect recovery.
